title: Jr. Manager, Marketing Enablement (EMEA)
required_skills: Marketing enablement or marketing operations experience
matched_skills: Marketing operations and enablement (SOPs product guides sales training)
Martech exposure via sales enablement tools and analytics
Data-driven approach with Power BI PL-300 and Looker Studio
Cross-functional collaboration (Hapag-Lloyd agile sprints, HSBC USD 8M PMO)
Additional languages: German B1+ Chinese C2 Japanese B1
EMEA and international experience (Germany HK Taiwan)
missing_skills: Vendor partnership management at regional scale
Change management rollout at EMEA level
Specific martech platform admin experience (Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Adobe, etc.)
core_responsibilities: Execute marketing enablement strategy for key projects across EMEA region
Coordinate rollout and deployment of new tools and training programs
Support project management deployment and operational maintenance of martech platforms
Gather and analyze data to evaluate platform performance adoption rates and ROI
Produce regular reports and dashboards on platform metrics
Identify opportunities for continuous improvement across marketing technology ecosystem
recommended_emphasis: Sales enablement and training delivery (SOPs product guides demos) maps to platform enablement rollout
Cross-functional project management: Agile at Hapag-Lloyd plus USD 8M PMO at HSBC
Power BI PL-300 and Looker Studio for platform metrics dashboards
Multilingual profile (German English Chinese Japanese) standout for EMEA
GTM execution across 4 product launches and 100+ B2B clients shows hands-on delivery
International career span (Germany HK Taiwan) fits multinational entertainment environment
